name: Red Curry Mixed Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 7 red chilies, seeded and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Process all curry paste ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth. Store in the refrigerator for up to 3 weeks or freeze for 3 months.
2. Combine coconut milk, salt, and brown sugar in a bowl; set aside.
3. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat. Add curry paste (or more to taste) and stir fry for 1 minute.
4. Increase heat to high and add green beans, eggplant, bell pepper, and mushrooms. Stir fry until vegetables are tender-crisp.
5. Reduce heat to medium and add the coconut milk mixture. Stir and cook for an additional minute.
6. Serve hot over cooked jasmine rice and garnish with basil leaves and lime peel.
